description: A clean, high-end testimonial slider. One testimonial is visible at a time. The quote text is large (2.5rem) and centered, using Cormorant Garamond italic. Below the quote, the client's name and title appear in small-caps Inter. Navigation is handled by two minimalist 'Prev/Next' arrows in Gold. The background is a stark Crisp White with charcoal text to provide a visual 'break' from the dark theme.
